theme: beacon frequencies reused across a ring of relay towers
title: Ring Beacons: Clean-Beat Reuse over a Composite Frequency Ring
strategies: trivial baseline: pick k residues uniformly at random from Z_n (reproduces the checker's reference construction)
direct greedy set-cover: repeatedly add the residue (best of a random batch) that hits the most new target beat-differences in Z_n; ignores the composite structure and plateaus in a huge ring

CRT decomposition: recognize |D(B) cap T| = prod_i |D(B_i) cap A_i| for a residue product B=B1 x B2 x B3; split k=k1*k2*k3, design a near-perfect per-factor difference cover B_i in each small Z_{m_i}, take the CRT product
budget-split search: enumerate factorizations k=k1*k2*k3 and per-factor local-search the difference covers, keeping the assignment maximizing the coverage product
